commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=991aaf47d43019ab5c7fe9b14b57d6318082114b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `openclaw.compat.pluginApi` compatibility checks across npm/path/bundle installs, discovery, manifest-registry loading, ClawHub range comparison, docs, and focused tests, plus a small lazy-import test cleanup in the agent/model path.

PR surface: Source +227, Tests +455, Docs +18. Total +700 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main shows the installer and manifest registry only enforce `minHostVersion`, while the PR body supplies an exact live npm proof command for the older-host WhatsApp failure path; I did not rerun it because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A focused automated repair can clear the stale fallback metadata bug and add the missing regression; maintainer sign-off is still needed for the broader fail-closed rollout.
